name: Firsthand Technology Value Fund, Inc.
summary: Firsthand Technology Value Fund, Inc. (SVVC) is an externally managed, closed-end, non-diversified business development company (BDC) incorporated in Maryland. It invests primarily in equity and equity-related securities of technology and cleantech companies, focusing on late-stage private companies and micro-cap public companies. At least 80% of assets are invested in technology companies, with at least 70% in private or micro-cap public companies with market caps below $250 million. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through venture capital investments.
